prompt:
A hydroponic tub identical in size and layout to the beginner system is shown from a similar angle, but this time the net pots contain vibrant, deep green leafy plants with upright stems and full, healthy foliage. The lid is clean, the small access port shows clear, slightly aerated nutrient solution, and the attached airline and tubing look well-routed. The overall impression is of a well-balanced system with nutrient solution tuned for most leafy greens, ready for ongoing harvests.

The tub sits in a bright near-future solarpunk grow room, with additional thriving plants and reflective surfaces softly visible in the background. The 512×512 image is photorealistic with delicate stylization, no logos or readable text on the tub, and a composition that emphasizes the lush, healthy plants and tidy system hardware while the rest of the space remains warmly blurred, signaling a hydroponic tub that is fully ready for use.
